name: GOLFTEC Albuquerque
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. They utilize advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and improvement strategies. The facilities are designed for structured lessons and practice sessions, offering both individual coaching and memberships for access to their training bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION swing tracking and launch monitors for precise data analysis
Access to professional PGA coaches for personalized lesson plans and game improvement strategies
Custom club fitting services that optimize equipment for individual swing mechanics
Structured practice memberships providing guided training sessions with video feedback

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB not indicated
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: SkyTrak launch monitors used for club fitting and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can also bring your own equipment if preferred. Custom club fitting services use their advanced technology to match you with the best clubs for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned at GOLFTEC locations. Bringing outside food or beverages is not indicated as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play time is not specified on the website. GOLFTEC primarily focuses on structured lessons and practice sessions rather than full 18-hole simulator experiences.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and is designed to accommodate younger golfers with age-appropriate instruction and technology.
